sources.title: Cold by Nature | Full Movie | Mystery Thriller | Christina Jensen
sources.description:
*Cold by Nature*  - Caleb Bodine and his mother Rachel, ardent animal rights activists, secretly kidnap and rescue animals subjected to cruel laboratory testing at the Chemtech Pharmaceutical Corporation, owned by Calebís own cold-blooded cousin, Cole. 
2009.  Stars: Maggie Bofill, Amy Renée Garcia, Christina Jensen
